{"code":"(def sentry (sentry_issues))
(def pagerduty (pagerduty_incidents))
(def unresolved-by-service
  (->> sentry
       (filter #(= "unresolved" (:status %)))
       (group-by :project)
       (map (fn [[svc issues]] [svc (count issues)]))
       (filter (fn [[svc cnt]] (> cnt 5)))
       (into {})))
(def hot-services (set (keys unresolved-by-service)))
